close_reason: Simplified to majority quorum and removed shard_tags
description:
## Goal
Stop persisting shard_tags in bootstrap - they're computed, not stored.

## File
`lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/persistence_phase.ex`

## Changes
```elixir
defp build_log_entries(transaction_system_layout) do
  Enum.map(transaction_system_layout.logs, fn {log_id, _descriptor} ->
    %{id: log_id, otp_ref: nil, shard_tags: []}  # Empty tags
  end)
end
```

No need to persist computed shard assignments - they're derived from consistent hashing.
title: Simplify PersistencePhase to use empty shard_tags
